g.text: Installer-based provisioning with PXE boot on bare metal
Search for a free IP address in DHCP
Download kernel and initial RAM disk
Report status of TFTP, DHCP & DNS
Request reserved IP and DHCP options
Get MAC-based configuration for boot loader
Download installer kernel and initial RAM disk
Provide installer configuration, such as a Kickstart file
Request reserved IP address and DHCP options
Provide MAC-based configuration for boot loader
